english: He was a soccer player, but it was literature that he loved most. At the time, Korea was under Japanese rule. He was late for a meeting because he had missed the train.
korean: 그는 축구 선수였지만 가장 사랑한 것은 문학이었습니다. 그 당시 한국은 일본의 통치하에 있었습니다. 그는 기차를 놓쳤었기 때문에 회의에 늦었습니다.
structure: It was + N + that / had + p.p.
